meta.title: Estime Vangu — Frontend & Product Engineer
meta.description: Frontend-focused developer building modern web applications with a strong emphasis on product thinking, performance, and user experience.

hero.name: Estime Vangu

WorkScreen.title: Work

meta.title: Work
meta.description: Selected work and case studies — Estime Vangu.

paragraphs: I build modern web applications with a product-oriented frontend approach.
My work goes beyond interfaces: I care equally about user experience, product clarity, and how an application is actually used day to day.
I mainly work on SaaS, B2B, and internal tools where execution quality, performance, and product clarity have a tangible impact.

productMindset.title: Product mindset
paragraphs: I start every project by understanding the real need before thinking about the technical solution.
The goal is not to add features for the sake of it, but to build something coherent, usable, and able to evolve properly.
I prefer pragmatic decisions, well-thought MVPs, and architecture that stays clear rather than unnecessary complexity too early.

frontendPhilosophy.title: Frontend philosophy
paragraphs: For me, frontend is not only about the interface. It sets the rhythm, fluidity, and readability of a product.
I pay particular attention to:
The goal is to create clear, fast, and pleasant interfaces without overloading the experience.
bullets: details that make an app feel natural to use

buildingApplications.title: Building applications
paragraphs: I like building complete products that work in real contexts.
That includes both user experience and the technical structure behind the application.
I usually work on:
With a strong focus on maintainability, performance, and the product’s ability to evolve over time.
bullets: applications that require real product logic

technicalApproach.title: Technical approach
paragraphs: I favor simple, readable, and maintainable architectures.
The goal is to build solid foundations without unnecessarily complicating the project.
I work with a component-oriented approach, coherent UI systems, and constant attention to:
Technology should serve the product, not the other way around.

motionInteraction.title: Motion & interaction
paragraphs: I use animation and micro-interactions to improve user experience, reinforce visual hierarchy, and add a sense of fluidity.
Motion should support the interface, not distract the user.
I aim for natural, consistent interactions that stay discreet enough to remain useful.

collaborationExecution.title: Collaboration & execution
paragraphs: I value communication, clear priorities, and the ability to move a project forward concretely.
I prefer a pragmatic approach:
The goal always remains the same: build serious, usable, and well-executed products.

closing.label: In short
paragraphs: I am mainly interested in SaaS, B2B, and modern tools that require real product thinking and strong attention to user experience.
Products designed to be actually used, evolve over time, and stay pleasant to use every day.
